title: Senior Doctor - RML Hospital Holdings Services - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - RML Hospital Holdings Services - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
RML Hospital Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Raipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About RML Hospital Holdings Services:
RML Hospital Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RML Hospital Holdings Services!
